title: カラオケでパワーアップ！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio has dragged me to a karaoke booth.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're ready for this, because my super
special concert is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Umapyoi! Umapyoi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Comin' in! This is the goddess of harvest Golshi
herself, bringing a gift of sweet nectar to you
lowly peasants!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh, the hell is that?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Um... These don't look safe for consumption. Just
look at those weird colors.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! Are you telling me you will not
partake of my handcrafted libation, mixed with
love and chaos?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Stop looking at the drinks and pay attention
to me! I'm singing here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huff! You lot dare refuse my kindness? This calls
for punishment!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Next up to pitch, it's the ultimate Golshi! She
takes the juice in hand... She readies to throw...
And there it goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I shout and dive in front of Tokai Teio, just
managing to cover her. A moment later, the juice
floods my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh! Oh no, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! Wow, what a relief!
choice_data_list:
There's no time to lose! We need to start
training at once!

There's no time to lose! We need to start
training at once!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll start with 300 chants of "Umapyoi," 300
scales, 300 rounds of tambourine practice, and
run-throughs of the entire tracklist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, it's dancing while singing. And of
course we need to do weight training. Okay! Let's
start off with 300 crunches and―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Trainer, go back to normaaal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't really remember what happened. However,
I feel like we had a very productive day filled with
training.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It's actually... good?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It is, it is! The color is weird but it's super sweet
and I feel like I'm bursting with energy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: AHAHAHA! I think I'm on the edge of genius!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this! ♪ WHEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Teio's really spinning! Actually, she's
spinning a little too fast... I'm getting... dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You're going waaay too fast...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Are you not entertained?! Ha, ha, ha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even for Teio, this is a whole new level of
hyperactive. I'm a little worried for her
wellbeing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her dancing seems remarkably improved. A
part of me hopes she can hold on to this feeling.
